questions.question: Tile fitting ke kaam mein sabse important safety equipment kya hai?

options.A: Safety Goggles

questions.explanation: Safety goggles aankhon ko dust, debris aur chemical splashes se bachate hain, jo tile fitting ke dauran common hain.

questions.question: Manual tile cutter use karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Gloves pehnein

questions.explanation: Gloves pehenne se haathon ko cuts aur abrasions se bachaya ja sakta hai, jo manual tile cutter use karte samay ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Work area ko clean aur organised rakhna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Accidents se bachne ke liye
options.B: Kaam jaldi khatam karne ke liye
options.C: Client ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek saaf aur organised work area trips, falls aur doosre accidents ke chances ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: First Aid kit site par kyun honi chahiye?

options.A: Minor injuries ka turant ilaaj karne ke liye
options.B: Medical emergencies ka permanent solution dene ke liye

questions.explanation: First Aid kit minor cuts, bruises ya burns ka turant ilaaj karne ke liye essential hai, taaki infection na faile.

questions.question: PPE ka full form kya hai?

options.A: Personal Protection Equipment

questions.explanation: PPE ka matlab Personal Protection Equipment hai, jo workers ko hazards se bachata hai.

questions.question: Electrical tools use karte samay kya check karna chahiye?

options.A: Wire damage toh nahi hai

questions.explanation: Damaged wires electrical shock ya short circuit ka reason ban sakte hain, isliye check karna important hai.

questions.question: Tile fitting mein 'subfloor' kya hota hai?

options.A: Woh surface jis par tiles lagaye jaate hain

questions.explanation: Subfloor woh base surface hota hai jis par tiles directly install kiye jaate hain, jaise concrete slab ya plywood.

questions.question: Ek achhe tile technician ke liye sabse important skill kya hai?

options.A: Precision aur attention to detail

questions.explanation: Tiles ko sahi tarike se aur evenly lagane ke liye precision aur detail par dhyaan dena bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Tile fitting ke kaam mein dust se bachne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Dust mask pehenna

questions.explanation: Tile cutting aur grinding se uthne wali dust saans ki beemariyon ka karan ban sakti hai, isliye dust mask zaroori hai.

questions.question: Wet saw use karte samay paani ka kya role hai?

options.A: Blade ko thanda rakhna aur dust control karna

questions.explanation: Wet saw mein paani blade ko overheat hone se bachata hai aur cutting ke dauran uthne wali dust ko control karta hai.

questions.question: Tile installation se pehle surface ko level karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Tiles evenly baithein aur toote nahi
options.D: Client ko khush karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Unlevel surface par tiles lagane se tiles toot sakte hain ya uneven dikhenge. Level surface smooth finish ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Hazardous chemicals (jaise strong adhesives) handle karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Ventilation achha ho aur gloves pehnein
options.B: Unhe ghar ke andar store karein
options.C: Khuli hawa mein bina precautions ke use karein

questions.explanation: Hazardous chemicals fumes chhod sakte hain aur skin irritation kar sakte hain, isliye proper ventilation aur protective gear (gloves) zaroori hain.

questions.question: Ek tile fitter ko client ke saath kaise communicate karna chahiye?

options.A: Respectfully aur professional tarike se

questions.explanation: Achhi communication client satisfaction ke liye important hai. Respect aur professionalism se client ko trust hota hai.

questions.question: Tile installation ke dauran heavy lifting karte samay kya technique use karni chahiye?

options.A: Apne ghutnon ko bend karein aur back straight rakhein
options.B: Sirf apni back ka use karein
options.D: Kisi aur ko uthane ko kahein

questions.explanation: Sahi lifting technique (ghutne bend karna, back straight rakhna) back injuries se bachati hai.

questions.question: Ceramic tiles aur Vitrified tiles mein kya basic difference hai?

options.A: Vitrified tiles kam porous aur zyada durable hote hain
options.B: Ceramic tiles zyada expensive hote hain
options.C: Vitrified tiles sirf walls par lagte hain

questions.explanation: Vitrified tiles ko high temperature par banaya jaata hai, jisse woh kam porous, zyada strong aur stain-resistant hote hain ceramic tiles ke comparison mein.

questions.question: Agar aapko kisi electrical problem ka doubt ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Turant power off karein aur electrician ko bulayein
options.B: Khud theek karne ki koshish karein

questions.explanation: Electrical problems dangerous ho sakti hain. Safety ke liye power off karna aur professional electrician ko bulana hi sahi kadam hai.

questions.question: Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) ka kya objective hai?

options.A: Workplace par workers ki safety, health aur welfare ensure karna

questions.explanation: OHS ka main aim hai workplace ko safe banana aur workers ko health hazards se bachana.

questions.question: Tiles par adhesive lagane ke liye kaunsa tool use hota hai?

options.A: Notched Trowel

questions.explanation: Notched trowel adhesive ko evenly spread karne aur ridges banane ke liye use hota hai, jo tiles ko achhe se pakadte hain.

questions.question: Tiles ko seedha kaatne ke liye kaunsa tool best hai?

options.A: Manual Tile Cutter

questions.explanation: Manual tile cutter seedhe aur precise cuts ke liye ideal hota hai, khaaskar ceramic aur porcelain tiles mein.

questions.question: Grout ko tile joints mein fill karne ke liye kaunsa tool use hota hai?

options.A: Grout Float

questions.explanation: Grout float grout ko joints mein press karne aur excess grout ko remove karne ke liye design kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Wall tiles lagate samay tiles ko support dene ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.A: Tile Spacers

questions.explanation: Tile spacers tiles ke beech uniform gaps maintain karte hain, jo grouting ke liye zaroori hain aur tiles ko support dete hain jab tak adhesive set na ho jaye.

questions.question: Tiles ko level check karne ke liye kaunsa tool use hota hai?

options.A: Spirit Level

questions.explanation: Spirit level surface ki horizontal aur vertical level check karne ke liye use hota hai, taaki tiles evenly lagein.

questions.question: Adhesive mix karne ke liye kaunsa tool use hota hai?

options.A: Drill with mixing paddle

questions.explanation: Drill ke saath mixing paddle adhesive ko evenly aur lump-free mix karne ke liye efficient hai.

questions.question: Tiles ka size measure karne ke liye kaunsa tool use hota hai?

options.A: Measuring Tape

questions.explanation: Measuring tape tiles aur space ki accurate measurements lene ke liye fundamental tool hai.

questions.question: Irregular shapes ya curves mein tiles cut karne ke liye kaunsa tool best hai?

options.A: Tile Nippers

questions.explanation: Tile nippers chhote aur irregular cuts banane aur tiles ko shape dene ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Purane grout ko remove karne ke liye kaunsa tool use hota hai?

options.A: Grout Saw ya Multi-tool

questions.explanation: Grout saw ya ek oscillating multi-tool purane grout ko efficiently aur safely remove karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Tiles mein hole karne ke liye kaunse drill bits use hote hain?

options.A: Diamond-tipped drill bits

questions.explanation: Diamond-tipped drill bits tiles jaise hard materials mein clean aur precise holes banane ke liye design kiye gaye hain.

questions.question: Ek 'rubber mallet' ka kya use hai tile fitting mein?

options.A: Tiles ko gently tap karke level karna

questions.explanation: Rubber mallet tiles ko gently tap karke adhesive mein achhe se set karne aur level karne ke liye use hota hai, bina unhe damage kiye.

questions.question: Tile cutter ke blade ko sharp rakhna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Clean aur precise cuts ke liye
options.D: Tool ko heavy banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Sharp blade clean aur accurate cuts provide karta hai, jisse tiles ke damage hone ka risk kam hota hai aur kaam smooth hota hai.

questions.question: Chalk line ka kya use hai tile work mein?

options.A: Straight reference lines mark karne ke liye
options.B: Tiles ko saaf karne ke liye
options.C: Grout colour check karne ke liye
options.D: Adhesive ki thickness check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Chalk line lambi, seedhi reference lines mark karne ke liye use hoti hai, jisse tile layout accurate rehta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'tile beating block' ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Tiles ko evenly set karna aur hollow spots hatana

questions.explanation: Tile beating block tiles par evenly pressure distribute karta hai jab unhe tap kiya jaata hai, jisse woh adhesive mein achhe se set ho jaate hain aur air pockets nahi bante.

questions.question: Angle grinder ka primary use kya hai tile fitting mein?

options.A: Tiles ko curve ya small cuts dene ke liye aur rough edges grind karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Angle grinder diamond blade ke saath tiles ko curve cuts, small cuts dene aur rough edges ko smooth karne ke liye use hota hai. Yeh kaafi powerful tool hai aur safety precautions ke saath use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Laser level ka kya advantage hai traditional spirit level par?

options.A: Longer distances par accurate level provide karta hai aur hands-free operation possible hai

questions.explanation: Laser level bade areas mein aur lambi distances par bahut accurate reference lines provide karta hai, jisse kaam ki speed aur precision badhti hai.

questions.question: Ek 'suction cup lifter' ka kya use hai?

options.A: Bade aur bhari tiles ko uthane aur position karne ke liye
options.C: Grout joints saaf karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Suction cup lifter smooth-faced tiles ko uthane aur precisely position karne mein help karta hai, jisse grip achhi rehti hai aur tiles damage nahi hote.

questions.question: Tile lagane se pehle floor surface ko clean karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Adhesive ki proper bonding ke liye
options.D: Client ko khush karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dust, dirt, oil ya grease ki wajah se adhesive surface se theek se chipak nahi pata, jisse tiles loose ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar floor uneven ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Self-leveling compound use karein

questions.explanation: Self-leveling compound floor ko smooth aur level surface provide karta hai, jo tile installation ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Purane tiles ko remove karne ke baad surface par kya check karna chahiye?

options.A: Koi loose debris ya purana adhesive toh nahi hai

questions.explanation: Loose debris ya purana adhesive naye tiles ki bonding ko affect kar sakta hai, isliye surface ko completely clean karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Wall surface par tiles lagane se pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.A: Wall plumb (seedhi) aur structurally sound hai
options.C: Wall par paintings hain ya nahi

questions.explanation: Ek plumb aur strong wall tiles ko theek se support karti hai aur unhe girne se rokti hai.

questions.question: Concrete subfloor ko tile installation ke liye kaise prepare karte hain?

options.A: Saaf karein, cracks repair karein aur level karein

questions.explanation: Concrete subfloor ko saaf, repair aur level karne se tiles ki longevity aur finish achhi rehti hai.

questions.question: Plywood subfloor par tiles lagane se pehle kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Plywood ki thickness aur stability check karein

questions.explanation: Plywood subfloor ka stable aur adequately thick hona zaroori hai, taaki tiles flex na karein aur toote nahi. Cement backer board bhi use kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Surface par 'primer' lagane ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Adhesive ki bonding ko improve karta hai aur surface ki porosity ko reduce karta hai

questions.explanation: Primer adhesive ke liye ek behtar base provide karta hai aur surface ki absorbency ko control karta hai, jisse adhesive uniformly set hota hai.

questions.question: Cracked subfloor ko kaise repair karna chahiye?

options.A: Cracks ko fill karein aur reinforcement use karein
options.C: Tiles ko directly cracks par laga dein

questions.explanation: Cracks ko epoxy ya similar crack repair compounds se fill karna aur reinforcement mesh use karna zaroori hai, taaki cracks tiles tak na pahunche.

questions.question: Shower area mein waterproofing kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Paani ko walls aur floor mein jaane se rokne ke liye, jisse mould aur damage na ho
options.C: Adhesive ko jaldi sukhane ke liye
options.D: Grout ka colour maintain karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Waterproofing bathroom aur shower areas mein moisture damage, mould growth aur structural problems ko prevent karta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'uncoupling membrane' ka kya use hai?

options.A: Subfloor aur tiles ke beech movement ko absorb karna, cracks ko prevent karna

questions.explanation: Uncoupling membrane subfloor ki movement ko tiles tak pahunchne se rokti hai, jisse stress cracks aur tile failures prevent hote hain.

questions.question: Old vinyl ya linoleum flooring par tiles lagane se pehle kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Ensure karein ki purani flooring stable aur clean hai ya use remove karein
options.B: Usi par directly adhesive laga dein

questions.explanation: Agar purani flooring unstable ya damaged hai toh use remove karna ya us par cement backer board lagana better hai. Stable hone par bhi surface preparation zaroori hai.

questions.question: Subfloor par oil ya grease stains hon toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Strong degreaser se saaf karein

questions.explanation: Oil aur grease adhesive ki bonding ko severely affect karte hain, isliye unhe completely remove karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Floor drains wale areas mein surface ko kaise prepare karte hain?

options.A: Drain ki taraf slope banayein

questions.explanation: Drain ki taraf proper slope banana zaroori hai taaki paani drain ho sake aur jama na ho, jisse water damage aur slip hazards prevent hote hain.

questions.question: Cement backer board ka kya fayda hai plywood subfloor par?

options.A: Water resistance provide karta hai aur tiles ke liye stable base deta hai

questions.explanation: Cement backer board moisture resistant hota hai aur plywood ki movement ko absorb karta hai, jisse tiles ke cracks hone ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Ek 'dry lay' ka kya importance hai tile installation se pehle?

options.A: Tile pattern, cuts aur layout ko finalise karne ke liye actual installation se pehle
options.B: Tiles ko saaf karne ke liye
options.C: Adhesive ko test karne ke liye
options.D: Grout colour select karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dry lay se aap tiles ke pattern, spacing aur cuts ko plan kar sakte hain, errors ko pehle hi identify kar sakte hain aur final look ka idea le sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar subfloor mein excessive moisture ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Moisture barrier apply karein ya moisture source ko theek karein

questions.explanation: Excessive moisture adhesive ko set hone se rok sakti hai aur mould growth ka karan ban sakti hai. Moisture source ko identify aur correct karna aur moisture barrier lagana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Floor tiles lagana kahan se shuru karna chahiye?

options.A: Room ke center se ya reference line se

questions.explanation: Center se shuru karne ya reference line follow karne se tile layout balanced rehta hai aur cuts walls ke paas evenly distribute hote hain.

questions.question: Tiles lagate samay 'back-buttering' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Tiles ke pichhe adhesive ki ek thin layer lagana
options.B: Tiles ke front par adhesive lagana

questions.explanation: Back-buttering tiles aur subfloor ke beech adhesive coverage ko improve karta hai, jisse hollow spots kam hote hain aur bonding strong hoti hai.

questions.question: Tile spacers ka kya use hai?

options.A: Tiles ke beech uniform grout lines maintain karna

questions.explanation: Tile spacers tiles ke beech consistent gaps banaye rakhte hain, jo uniform grouting aur achhe aesthetics ke liye essential hain.

questions.question: Adhesive lagane ke baad tiles ko kitni der mein laga dena chahiye?

options.A: Adhesive ke 'open time' ke andar

questions.explanation: Har adhesive ka ek specific 'open time' hota hai, jiske andar tiles lagane se proper bonding hoti hai. Iske baad adhesive dry hone lagta hai.

questions.question: Tiles ko adhesive par set karte samay kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Gently press karein aur rubber mallet se tap karein

questions.explanation: Gently pressing aur tapping se tiles adhesive mein achhe se set ho jaate hain aur air pockets remove hote hain.

questions.question: Wall tiles lagana kahan se shuru karna chahiye?

options.A: Bottom-up, ek level reference line se

questions.explanation: Bottom se shuru karne se tiles ko support milta hai aur ek straight base line maintain hoti hai. Level reference line se shuru karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Tiles lagane ke baad, grout karne se pehle kitni der tak wait karna chahiye?

options.A: Adhesive ke poori tarah set hone tak (usually 24-48 hours)

questions.explanation: Adhesive ko poori tarah set hone dena zaroori hai, taaki tiles apni jagah par fix ho jaayen aur grouting ke dauran hilne na.

questions.question: Large format tiles install karte samay kya special precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Back-buttering aur level-checking par zyada dhyaan dein

questions.explanation: Large format tiles ko hollow spots se bachane aur level rakhne ke liye back-buttering aur frequent level checks bahut zaroori hain. Leveling systems bhi use kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: 'Lippage' kya hota hai tile installation mein?

options.A: Jab ek tile dusre tile se thoda ooncha ya neecha ho

questions.explanation: Lippage tiles ki uneven height hai, jo trip hazard aur bad aesthetic ka karan banti hai. Isse bachne ke liye leveling systems use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Ek 'expansion joint' ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Tiles aur subfloor ke thermal expansion aur contraction ko allow karna

questions.explanation: Expansion joints tiles ko temperature aur moisture changes ki wajah se hone wale movement ko adjust karne dete hain, jisse tiles mein cracks nahi aate.

questions.question: Tile layout plan karte samay sabse pehle kya consider karna chahiye?

options.A: Room ka size aur shape, aur focal points

questions.explanation: Room ke dimensions, doors, windows aur focal points (jaise fireplace) ko consider karke layout plan karne se best aesthetic aur minimal cuts milte hain.

questions.question: Adhesive ki konsi type water-sensitive areas (jaise bathroom) ke liye best hai?

options.A: Waterproof ya water-resistant adhesive

questions.explanation: Waterproof ya water-resistant adhesive moisture penetration ko prevent karta hai aur tiles ko pani se damage hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Agar tiles lagate samay koi tile thoda uneven ho jaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Turant adjust karein ya nikal kar dobara lagayein
options.C: Us par zyada grout laga dein

questions.explanation: Adhesive ke set hone se pehle hi uneven tiles ko correct karna zaroori hai, taaki final finish smooth aur level ho.

questions.question: Tile installation mein 'buttering the floor' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Subfloor par adhesive lagana

questions.explanation: Flooring par notched trowel se adhesive spread karna 'buttering the floor' kehlata hai, jisse tiles ko fix kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Tile leveling system ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Lippage ko prevent karta hai aur tiles ko perfectly level rakhta hai
options.C: Grout colour ko change karta hai

questions.explanation: Tile leveling systems clips aur wedges ka use karte hain jo tiles ko ek hi level par hold karte hain jab tak adhesive set na ho jaye, jisse lippage eliminate hota hai.

questions.question: Ek 'thin-set mortar' ka kya role hai tile installation mein?

options.A: Tiles ko subfloor se bond karne ke liye use hone wala adhesive

questions.explanation: Thin-set mortar cement, fine sand aur water retention agents ka mixture hota hai jo tiles ko strong aur durable bond provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agar tiles ko diagonally lagana ho toh layout plan mein kya difference hoga?

options.A: Center lines 45-degree angle par mark karni hongi
options.D: Sirf corners se shuru karna hoga

questions.explanation: Diagonal layout ke liye center point se 45-degree par reference lines mark karna zaroori hai, jisse pattern symmetrical aur correct bane.

questions.question: Grouting karne se pehle tile joints ko clean karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Grout ki achhi bonding ke liye
options.D: Client ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dust, dirt ya adhesive residue grout ko theek se chipakne nahi dete, jisse grout weak ho sakta hai ya discolour ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Grout apply karne ke liye kaunsa tool use hota hai?

options.A: Grout Float

questions.explanation: Grout float grout ko joints mein press karne aur excess grout ko remove karne ke liye design kiya gaya hai, jisse smooth finish milti hai.

questions.question: Excess grout ko tiles ke surface se kaise remove karte hain?

options.A: Damp sponge se circular motion mein

questions.explanation: Damp sponge excess grout ko remove karta hai aur joints ko smooth karta hai, bina unhe damage kiye.

questions.question: Grout dry hone ke baad tiles par white haze (grout haze) reh jaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Grout haze remover use karein

questions.explanation: Grout haze remover tiles ko saaf karta hai aur unki natural shine wapas lata hai.

questions.question: Grout ko mix karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Manufacturer ke instructions follow karein aur sahi consistency maintain karein
options.C: Usko bahut der tak mix karein
options.D: Usko garam paani se mix karein

questions.explanation: Sahi consistency ka grout apply karna easy hota hai aur strong, durable joint banata hai.

questions.question: Tiles ke edges par kaunsa finishing material use hota hai, khaaskar jahan wall aur floor milte hain?

options.A: Caulk ya sealant

questions.explanation: Caulk ya sealant expansion joints aur corners par use hota hai, jo flexibility provide karta hai aur paani ko andar jaane se rokta hai.

questions.question: Grout sealer ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Grout ko stain-resistant aur water-resistant banata hai
options.D: Grout ka colour change karta hai

questions.explanation: Grout sealer grout ki porosity ko reduce karta hai, jisse woh stains aur moisture ko absorb nahi karta aur uski life badhti hai.

questions.question: Epoxy grout ka kya fayda hai ordinary cementitious grout par?

options.A: Zyada water-resistant, chemical-resistant aur durable hota hai
options.D: Sirf dry areas mein use hota hai

questions.explanation: Epoxy grout high-traffic areas, bathrooms aur kitchens ke liye ideal hai kyunki yeh stains, chemicals aur moisture ke prati zyada resistant hota hai.

questions.question: Grout joints ki thickness kis par depend karti hai?

options.A: Tiles ke type, size aur desired aesthetic par

questions.explanation: Bade tiles ke liye bade joints aur chhote tiles ke liye chhote joints generally recommended hote hain. Design bhi ek factor hai.

questions.question: Grout ko apply karte samay kis angle par grout float ko hold karna chahiye?

options.A: 45-degree angle par, grout ko joints mein press karte hue

questions.explanation: 45-degree angle par float ko hold karne se grout joints mein achhe se pack hota hai aur excess material remove ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Grout mix mein zyada paani daalne ka kya result ho sakta hai?

options.A: Grout weak aur crumbly ho sakta hai
options.D: Grout ka colour dark ho jayega

questions.explanation: Zyada paani grout ki strength ko kam karta hai, jisse woh porous aur prone to cracking ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Quality control ke liye tile installation ke baad kya check karna chahiye?

options.A: Lippage, hollow spots, uniform grout lines aur cleanliness

questions.explanation: Yeh sab checks final product ki quality aur durability ensure karte hain aur client satisfaction ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Agar grout joints mein pinholes dikhein toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Extra grout apply karke fill karein

questions.explanation: Pinholes grout ki porosity badhate hain, jisse moisture aur dirt andar ja sakti hai. Unhe fill karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Textured tiles par grouting karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Grout ko jaldi saaf karein taaki texture mein na fase
options.D: Textured tiles par grout na karein

questions.explanation: Textured tiles ki uneven surface par grout fas sakta hai, jisse saaf karna mushkil ho jaata hai. Turant cleaning zaroori hai.

questions.question: Grout ko cure hone ke liye kitna time lagta hai?

options.A: Usually 72 hours tak poori strength ke liye

questions.explanation: Grout ko poori strength develop karne aur waterproof hone ke liye sufficient curing time dena zaroori hai. Is dauran area ko dry rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Coving (curved transition between floor and wall) ke liye kaunsa grout ya sealant use karte hain?

options.A: Flexible sealant ya epoxy grout

questions.explanation: Coving areas mein movement hoti hai, isliye flexible material jaise silicone sealant ya highly flexible epoxy grout use karna chahiye taaki cracks na aayein.

questions.question: Agar grout colour uneven ho jaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Grout colourant ya stain use karein ya regrout karein

questions.explanation: Uneven grout colour mixing errors, inconsistent water content ya improper curing ki wajah se ho sakta hai. Colourant ya regrouting se ise theek kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Loose tile ko kaise repair karte hain?

options.A: Usko nikal kar purane adhesive ko saaf karein aur naye adhesive se dobara lagayein

questions.explanation: Loose tile ko properly fix karne ke liye purane adhesive ko remove karna aur naye adhesive se re-install karna hi sahi tarika hai.

questions.question: Toote hue tile ko badalne ke liye sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Toote hue tile ke aas-paas ke grout ko remove karein

questions.explanation: Aas-paas ke grout ko remove karne se toote hue tile ko bina doosre tiles ko damage kiye nikalna easy ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Tiles ki regular cleaning ke liye kya use karna chahiye?

options.A: Mild cleaner aur paani

questions.explanation: Mild cleaner aur paani tiles aur grout ko saaf rakhte hain bina unhe damage kiye.

questions.question: Grout ko discolour hone se kaise bachayein?

options.A: Regular cleaning aur grout sealer use karein

questions.explanation: Grout sealer stains ko penetrate hone se rokta hai aur regular cleaning se dirt accumulate nahi hoti.

questions.question: Client complaint ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.A: Dhyaan se sunein, polite rahein aur solution offer karein

questions.explanation: Achhi customer service professional image banati hai aur future business ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Agar tile installation ke baad 'hollow sound' aaye toh kya indicate karta hai?

options.A: Adhesive ki poor coverage ya air pockets
options.B: Tile bahut achhe se laga hai

questions.explanation: Hollow sound ka matlab hai ki tile ke niche adhesive poori tarah se nahi laga hai, jisse tile toot sakta hai.

questions.question: Purane grout ko remove karne ke baad naya grout lagane ko kya kehte hain?

options.A: Regrouting

questions.explanation: Regrouting purane, damaged ya discoloured grout ko naye grout se replace karna hai, jisse finish fresh ho jaye.

questions.question: Floor tiles par heavy furniture rakhne se kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Furniture ke legs par felt pads lagayein

questions.explanation: Felt pads tiles ko scratches aur damage se bachate hain jab furniture move kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar tiles par stubborn stain ho toh kya use karna chahiye?

options.A: Tile-specific stain remover, manufacturer ki instructions follow karte hue

questions.explanation: Tile-specific stain removers tiles ko damage kiye bina stains ko remove karne ke liye design kiye gaye hain. Always test on an inconspicuous area first.

questions.question: Customer ko tile maintenance ke baare mein kya advice deni chahiye?

options.A: Regular cleaning, grout sealing aur abrasive cleaners avoid karna
options.B: Tiles ko kabhi saaf na karein

questions.explanation: Proper maintenance advice tiles ki longevity badhati hai aur customer satisfaction ensure karti hai.

questions.question: Tile installation ke dauran ya baad mein hone wale 'efflorescence' kya hai?

options.A: Tiles ya grout par white powdery deposit

questions.explanation: Efflorescence tab hota hai jab paani soluble salts ko surface par lata hai aur paani evaporate hone par salts pichhe reh jaate hain. Isse saaf karne ke liye mild acid cleaners use hote hain.

questions.question: Agar client unexpected design changes chahe toh kaise react karna chahiye?

options.A: Requirements ko clearly document karein, feasibility discuss karein aur cost adjustment ke baare mein batayein

questions.explanation: Professionalism aur clear communication client satisfaction ke liye crucial hai, khaaskar jab changes involve ho.

questions.question: Agar kisi tile mein hairline crack ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Crack ko epoxy filler se fill karein ya tile ko replace karein agar crack badh raha ho

questions.explanation: Hairline cracks ko fill karne se unka failna ruk sakta hai, lekin agar crack badh raha ho ya structural ho toh tile replacement hi best option hai.

questions.question: Ek 'warranty' ka kya matlab hai tile work mein?

options.A: Workmanship aur materials ki quality ki guarantee ek specific period ke liye
options.B: Sirf tiles ka colour achha hoga

questions.explanation: Warranty client ko protection provide karti hai ki agar specified period ke andar koi defect ho toh use repair ya replace kiya jayega.

questions.question: Agar client project ke dauran dissatisfied ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unki concerns ko address karein, corrective actions lein aur unhe regularly update karein
options.B: Unse baat karna band kar dein

questions.explanation: Client satisfaction business ki reputation ke liye essential hai. Active listening aur problem-solving approach se issues ko resolve kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Sustainable tile fitting practices mein kya shamil hai?

options.A: Eco-friendly materials use karna, waste reduce karna aur energy efficient methods apnana

questions.explanation: Sustainable practices environment par negative impact ko kam karti hain aur long-term benefits provide karti hain.
